candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; identical values to Total Revenue but slightly less conventional label, so kept as secondary option.
Explicit total revenue/top line; matches REVT definition and equals Operating revenues figures. Best primary choice.
This is a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Balance sheet liability, not a revenue flow.
Tax liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Both revenue lines are identical; using Total Revenue as primary and Operating revenues as fallback per multi-label rule.

candidates.why: Major direct production cost component, often core of COGS; good fallback if aggregate COGS unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Explicit COGS label; matches definition of direct cost of sales.
Inventory change adjustment, not the main COGS line; only a component.
Explicit aggregate COGS line with full series; best primary representation of COGS.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

variables.notes: Use the explicit COGS aggregate first; include the other COGS-labeled line and major component as fallbacks in case of missing years.

candidates.why: Canonical SG&A-type overhead bucket; excludes COGS and is part of operating expenses.
Typical SG&A component (personnel/compensation overhead). Should be included in SG&A components.

variables.notes: Both rows are SG&A components; no total/subtotal SG&A row is present, so multiple component rows are selected per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization portion related to R&D, but not the primary R&D expense line; can inflate XRD if used alone.
Supplemental disclosure of R&D expenses; useful but secondary to the main R&D expense line.
Explicit R&D expense line item; matches XRD definition directly.
Capitalized R&D on the balance sheet, not period expense; should not be used for XRD.
Total R&D expenditure (likely combining expensed and capitalized portions); reasonable fallback if main expense line missing.
Balance sheet adjustment, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Use the explicit expense line primarily; keep total and supplemental R&D items as fallbacks. Exclude balance sheet development costs from XRD.

candidates.why: Core interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; part of interest expense and good secondary line.
Represents income attributable to NCI, not interest on debt.
Same as above, not interest expense.
Equity interest, not financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; good tertiary backup.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt category, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity of minority holders, not interest expense.
Equity of minorities, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: XINT should be a single reported line over time; order gives ordinary interest expense first, then lease-related interest variants.

candidates.why: Equity attributable to parent shareholders only; close to book equity of common but excludes NCI.
Best representation of total shareholders’ equity per instructions (book/total equity).

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not an equity definition.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Total equity is primary book equity; Majority equity retained as secondary in case Total equity is missing for some years.

candidates.why: Period income attributable to minorities, not the equity balance, though indicates presence of NCI.
Duplicate terminology for income flow; not preferred for equity MIB.
Appears in OCI context as a flow, not the balance-sheet minority equity.
Balance sheet minority equity; best match for MIB definition.
Alternative label for the same minority equity balance; good fallback.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet minority equity for MIB, with both label variants ordered as primary and fallback.
